CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"AUD"),( Amount /1.140973),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"CAD"),( Amount /1.121080),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"CHF"),( Amount /0.952225),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"DKK"),( Amount /5.866780),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"EUR"),( Amount /0.788022),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"GBP"),( Amount /0.621245),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"HKD"),( Amount /7.758895),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"ILS"),( Amount /3.714905),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"JPY"),( Amount /107.857000),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"KRW"),( Amount /1062.072500),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"MYR"),( Amount /3.267240),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"NOK"),( Amount /6.511760),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"PHP"),( Amount /44.821650),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"PLN"),( Amount /3.309545),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"SEK"),( Amount /7.208575),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"SGD"),( Amount /1.274250),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"THB"),( Amount /32.439950),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"TRY"),( Amount /2.264305),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"TWD"),( Amount /30.420400),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"ZAR"),( Amount /11.116765),0)+ IF(ISPICKVAL( CurrencyIsoCode,"USD"),( Amount ),0)
CustomField.label: Converted Amount(USD)
